title: ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 3pc
description:
Easily test the purity of platinum with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Testing Kit! The kit includes two, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles and one testing stone. The platinum testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for jewelry appraisal, jewelry making and design, precious metal mining or other professions that work with platinum. And, housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the platinum testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, so you can maintain control over the amount of testing solution escaping the bottle

ToolTreaux Platinum Testing Kit with Testing Stone, 3pc

Easily test the purity of platinum with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Testing Kit! The kit includes two, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles and one testing stone. The platinum testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of tests! A must-have tool for jewelry appraisal, jewelry making and design, precious metal mining or other professions that work with platinum. And, housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the platinum testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, so you can maintain control over the amount of testing solution escaping the bottle.

Key Features

  • PLATINUM TESTING KIT: Easily test the purity of platinum with ToolTreaux’s Platinum Testing Solution Kit with Testing Stone! The kit includes two, 0.5oz shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles and one testing stone; the platinum testing solutions are potent, effective and will see you through hundreds of future tests!
  • PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is best used on raw platinum nuggets or grains, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise a finished piece
  • HOW THE PLATINUM TESTING KIT WORKS: To test for platinum purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the material on the scratch stone is platinum, the deposit should keep its bright white color; ensure the testing stone has been thoroughly washed
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Testing Stone Dimensions: 2 x 1.5 x 0.25 inches; Stone Weight: 0.01lbs; Bottle Dimensions: 3 x 1 x 1 inches; Bottle Weight: 0.04lbs; Bottle Material: Plastic; Solution Capacity: 0.5 ounces; Solution made in USA
  • NOTE: Keep out of reach of children; Use caution when opening and using; Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended; Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • MPN: 8J4GS7763G
  • UPC: 810058482655
  • Color: Clear
  • Size: Small

PLATINUM TESTING KIT METHOD: This platinum testing method is best used on raw platinum nuggets or grains, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item; if testing fine jewelry or other finished items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot so as not to compromise a finished piece

HOW THE PLATINUM TESTING KIT WORKS: To test for platinum purity, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit, then place a small drop of the solution over top of deposit; if the material on the scratch stone is platinum, the deposit should keep its bright white color for up to a minute; ensure the testing stone has been thoroughly washed before performing any purity tests

SAFETY NOTE: Testing Solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Read the label on the bottle and follow the included operational instructions.
